hotel_name: Khách sạn Liberty Đà Nẵng (Liberty Hotel Da Nang)

reviews.title: The price is only cheap, and the cleanliness is terrible.
reviews.text: The location is good, the female staff is friendly, and the price is very cheap. However, cleanliness is a 0 out of 10, and the facilities are quite outdated. Considering the price, it's hard to expect much, but still, there were hairs on the towels... and ants swarming on the bed. I chose this place for storing my luggage and taking a shower before my departure, but I felt uneasy about opening my suitcase and taking a shower here... Sure enough, when I opened my suitcase upon returning home, I found an ant inside... ^^ I don't want to use this place again, even for half a night...

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Only the location.
reviews.negatives:
This hotel is completely overrated I am sorry to say. 

The rooms are old and banged up. My bed had bed bugs and they said they are ants! 

Very noisy from the hallway and also outside. 

Management doesn’t seem to care about this hotel, as you can also see by the neon sign only being half lit at night. 

Not a pleasant experience.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: fda

reviews.title: Don’t stay if you are not a smoker
reviews.positives: The location
reviews.negatives:
The smell in the room is horrible. We spent 3 days trying to figure out where the cigarette smell was coming from but it was impossible. If you have free time in Da Nang I challenge you to guess from where is it coming. Usually I don’t care if the room does not smell really good but in this case was another level of awful smell. It made me cough. It felt like being next to a smoker the whole time you where inside the hotel.
Also the hotel is in the first floor but the garage in the ground floor was always open which didn’t feel safe at all. You can get to the elevator and to the rooms from there

reviews.title: Review of a 0.5-night stay
reviews.text: The facility is very old. It feels like a Korean guesthouse. I stayed briefly to rest before an early morning flight. That seems to be just about suitable. The location is great, being just a block away from the market. However, because it is so central in the city, the noise is very loud, making it hard to sleep.

reviews.title: Affordable
reviews.positives: The location
reviews.negatives: I stayed in 3 nights but they didn’t collect trash, change toơels or make room :(

reviews.title: It's cheap but...
reviews.text:
It was cheap and I booked it for a 0.5-night stay on the day of arrival, but late check-in was not an issue. The staff was quite friendly. However... the condition of the accommodation is not good.

There was mold on the ceiling. Ants on the floor and shelves. There was a shower filter that someone had used and left behind (it looked very dirty and old). The bathroom floor did not drain, almost causing a flood.

The location is good. They also stored my luggage, and the staff was really friendly. If you are not sensitive about cleanliness, it might be okay. However, I would advise couples or women against staying here for a 0.5-night stay. I received complaints from my travel companion the whole time for booking this place, haha.

reviews.title: Highly recommend!
reviews.positives: Great location, reasonable cost, good wifi, good a/c, good hot water and very friendly staff.

reviews.title: Recommended for a 0.5-night stay.
reviews.text: It's perfect for packing up and taking a shower before heading to the airport for a 0.5 night stay. The air conditioning is great. I didn't see any bugs at all. The staff is friendly. Early check-in is also possible.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: la ubicación
reviews.negatives: te bañas y se moja todo el baño

reviews.title: A place where you stayed for a short time.
reviews.text: I stayed for a while to wash up before going to the airport. It was cleaner than the center right next to it. The location is excellent!! The price is super cheap, so I'm satisfied!! It's great to wash up before going to the airport~~

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Muy bien ubicado. Limpio y cómodo. Muy amables en la gestión de la estancia.

reviews.title: It is suitable for a 0.5 night stay.
reviews.text: It is a very good location for Han Market. There is an elevator, and the cleanliness is not bad, but even with the air conditioning on, it doesn't get very cool. On the last day, I made a reservation to organize my luggage and take a shower before my departure, but I ended up sweating again while showering and packing my things.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: Bruit de l’ascenseur à chaque ouverture..

reviews.title: Improvement of the bathroom view is needed.
reviews.text: The bathroom is very small and inconvenient to use. The shower pressure is weak. The fixing device is broken, and the refrigerator temperature is not right. The entrance on the ground floor is a mess. There were no staff available at checkout, so I had to wait.

reviews.title: Beau bon pas cher
reviews.positives:
Bien situé sur DaNang, près du pont Dragon.
Hotel correct pour le bas prix, pas de vermine &co.
La chambre était petite mais fonctionnelle.
reviews.negatives: J'aurais aimé que le service puisse se débrouiller en anglais pour simplifier les échanges. On a quand même pu se comprendre avec Google traduction.

reviews.title: Um... so what I mean is...
reviews.text: Every time we change accommodations, we think this way. It must be just like the photos... That's right. This place is just like the photos. The bed is the same, the curtains are the same. There’s an electric kettle, a phone, and blankets too. However... I recommend this for solo male travelers with an unassuming personality, and hope couples or families will consider other options. Da Nang is small and there are plenty of places to stay.

reviews.title: 最悪
reviews.positives: 昼間のスタッフ
reviews.negatives: 夜間スタッフの対応、室内カビ、冷蔵庫カビ、床が髪の毛とゴミ、埃だらけ、近隣ホテルの工事騒音

reviews.title: A hotel with a good location in the city center.
reviews.text: It was a hotel in a good location, great for a brief rest. Most reviews of downtown hotels aren't good, so I approached it with some caution, but it was better than I expected. I stayed for 0.5 nights, but I didn’t want to stay more than one night. There are many famous restaurants along the beach, so I think finding accommodation in that area could also be a good option.

reviews.title: 安いものには気を付けろ
reviews.positives: ロケーションだけは良いです。大聖堂にもハン市場にも近い。
reviews.negatives:
まずシャワーのお湯が出ませんでした。お金の計算は普通に間違えてました。
自転車のレンタルはありません。

reviews.title: comfortable
reviews.text: the room is clean, however, after 4 nights, they did not replace the water, cleaning supplies, towels...

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives:
ロケーションがよかった。
ダナン大聖堂、ハン市場はすぐだしドラゴンブリッジは徒歩圏内。
reviews.negatives: Googleマップに表示されるホテル名と違って分かりにくかった。

reviews.title: Top location, final day 0.5 night.
reviews.text: A very good accommodation for 0.5 nights, there is no hair dryer! It's nice to wash up and go to the nearby market or restaurant, and there are many massage shops, plus the Han River right next to it is beautiful~ The hot water didn’t come out, but it was just right for a wash since it was hot… There are a few mosquitoes! Still, it’s okay for the last day of traveling alone!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: スタッフが親切
reviews.negatives: 外から戻ってきた際に部屋の鍵が毎回なかなか開けられなくて、大変だった。

reviews.title: Affordable hotels near the market.
reviews.text: I arrived after lunch using Jeju Air, and I used it to buy some things near Han Market. I was satisfied with the performance considering the price. However, I was startled when I tried to leave early in the morning because the shutter was closed, haha.

reviews.title: 非常好離漢市場很近
reviews.positives: 櫃檯小姐非常客氣即時提供幫助
reviews.negatives: 無

reviews.title: Affordable and somewhat comfortable.
reviews.text: The owner helped with the early morning check-in, even while feeling tired. The staff has a pretty smile. A decent accommodation near Han Market and the Han River. Satisfaction with cost performance is good. I was scared after reading the reviews, but it was better than expected. There were some reviews that said it was completely dirty and bad, but it was clean, and the mold wasn't that severe, there was enough space to open my suitcase, they provided two bottles of water every day, and the air conditioning and Wi-Fi worked very well. If you consider it just a local homestay, it's a good accommodation, but if you think of it as a Korean hotel, it may seem bad or dirty. There are definitely places you should run away from, as mentioned in the reviews. It's dark, musty, and smells of mold. At least this place offers good cost performance. With strong Wi-Fi, enjoying the air conditioning inside the accommodation, and a bed that's quite soft, it's a decent choice if you want to stay near Han Market.

reviews.title: 발코니 방 절대 예약하지 마세요
reviews.positives: 없음
reviews.negatives: 기대안됨

reviews.title: The cost-performance is decent for a 0.5-night stay.
reviews.text: I was quite worried because of the reviews. There were some ants, but it was good that I could clean up without too much inconvenience. Since I used it for organizing my luggage and showering for 6 hours due to my evening flight in Da Nang, I made a reservation for 2 people. I was a bit disappointed to find out that only 2 people could enter, but I understand because the cost performance is good.

reviews.title: 위치는 엄청좋아서 아주잠깐 머물수는 있는데 숙박은 비추
reviews.positives:
위치는 좋았어요. 한시장 근처라서 맛집이며 가게들 다있고 공항에서도 가깝고. 위치는 좋았고 엄청 시원합니다
사실 가격도 매우 저렴합니다
reviews.negatives:
결재를 현금으로만 받는다고 하네요 수많은 호텔다녀봤는데 현금결재만 받는다는 호텔은 여기가 처음이네요

싼만큼 객실이 좀 더럽네요. 침구에 핏방울 비슷한것도 좀 묻어있고 전반적으로 가격만 본다면 사용하는데 그외에는 비추.

reviews.title: It's relatively okay.
reviews.text: First of all, the location is good, right next to Han Market, making it very convenient for shopping. The room condition is also okay. The TV didn't work, and most of the accommodations in Da Nang were the same in that cold water didn't come out, lukewarm was the best it could get. You can unlock the door with a key and use a card key to turn on the air conditioner in advance, which was nice.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: 위치가 너무좋다
reviews.negatives: 창문이없어갑갑하다

reviews.title: If you really care about cost-performance, it's decent.
reviews.text: First of all, the staff is very friendly. (It seems like they are doing this as a family, and they are always cheerful and resolve any issues well.) The building is quite old, so the facilities are worn out, but I think it's fine for a man to come here just to sleep alone. The location is near Han Market and the Pink Cathedral, in a major central area, and there are also nearby places to eat, so I was most satisfied with the location. I recommend it if you're a man coming here just to sleep for around 10,000 won.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: 위치.가격.시설.직원 만족 했응
reviews.negatives: 침구먼지. 침대 머리맡 장식조각 먼지

reviews.title: Great staff
reviews.text: That's all , great staff

reviews.title: 좋아요 아주 좋아요
reviews.positives:
한시장 한강 맛사지샾 환전소 핑크성당 한식집
모두 몇발안에 있어요
reviews.negatives: 문이 잘 열기가 무척 힘들었음

reviews.title: Great location
reviews.text: Great location near Han Market and many restaurants. The rooms are definitely dated, but you can't and shouldn't complain for the price.

reviews.title: 최고의 위치
reviews.positives: 도보로 다낭중심가를 3분내로 도착
reviews.negatives: 별로 없음

reviews.title: The staff members are very friendly.
reviews.text: I chose this hotel just for a quick shower after leaving my suitcase since I had an evening flight, but when I went out and came back to change clothes, I found ants on the table where I had put my clothes! I didn't bring any food at all because I was worried about ants, only water, but there they were. However, I noticed that other foreigners don’t seem to mind ants and eat their meals without concern. I wouldn't recommend this place for those who get startled by bugs like I do, but for those who don’t mind ants, it seems fine to use. Other than the ants, the staff were friendly and everything wasn’t bad!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: 前台小姑娘非常友好 服务非常贴心 价格很合理 地理位置很好
reviews.negatives: 电梯有噪音 房间隔音一般 浴室下水有点慢

reviews.title: A good value place to stop by and rest before heading to the airport.
reviews.text: It's the best way to comfortably kill time at a low price.

reviews.title: Trung bình
reviews.positives: Vị trí
reviews.negatives: Tiện nghi

reviews.title: It's not a 24-hour front desk..
reviews.text: A hotel operated by a family. Most Korean flights land in the early morning, so we had to check in right away. The door was locked, which was a bit surprising. I asked if it would be okay to step out for a moment before checking in, but I felt reluctant to go. Anyway, I was satisfied with the hotel considering the price.

reviews.title: Giá cả rẻ, nhưng mà vị trí thì lại rất là tốt
reviews.positives: Gần sông Hàn
reviews.negatives: Phòng hơi chật

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Good one

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Có thang máy. Nhân viên thân thiện.

reviews.title: Cost performance
reviews.text: I feel sorry for rating this hotel. I just booked it to briefly rest with my luggage. The owners are incredibly kind. You can see the unique smiling faces that are hard to find nowadays. They are kind to the point that I feel sorry. They helped with trunk taping and moving my luggage. The room is a bit old and the facilities are like that, but considering the price, it's a thank you.

reviews.title: RẤT TỐT
reviews.positives: Khách sạn ở vị trí trung tâm luôn nên rất thuận tiện cho việc đi lại. Đi vài bước là đến sông Hàn, cầu Rồng, nhà thờ, sau lưng khách sạn là chợ Hàn nên mình thấy rất tiện. Xung quanh có nhiều nhà hàng, quán cà phê đẹp nữa nên mình ở 1 ngày thôi mà đi và ăn uống được nhiều nơi. Phòng ở đây sạch sẽ, thoáng, điều hòa và wifi dùng tốt. Đặc biệt nhân viên và chủ khách sạn rất thân thiện, nhiệt tình mến khách nữa. Mọi người nói chuyện và take care khách rất tốt luôn. Nói chung là mình rất hài lòng khi ở đây. Dịp sau vào Đà Nẵng mình sẽ ghé lại Khách sạn ủng hộ. 10 điểm.

reviews.title: The room is so-so... The staff are friendly.
reviews.text:
There is an elevator and the staff are friendly. 
Maybe it's because I was shocked by the accommodation in Malaysia two weeks ago, but this feels good enough? Haha.
It seems well-maintained and clean, but the water drains slowly.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Ochotný personál.

reviews.title: 0.5 night accommodation
reviews.text: I stayed briefly at the airport facility. It's nice for a short stay... It might be scary to be alone as a woman.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Jeg kommer tilbage

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: located near to Han River and the pink church. lot of eateries nearby. the staff was super friendly and helpful. room was comfortable. there is fridge, kettle, drinking water, utilities and amenities are all provided. the only downside was, the blocked drain in shower room. it take time for water to drain and causing the water to flood.

reviews.title: Great value if you don't mind the noise
reviews.positives: Friendly and helpful staff.  Right near the river with many cafes and restaurants nearby.  Comfortable bed, hot water worked fine, wifi worked well.  Good value.
reviews.negatives: No sound insulation - bring ear plugs otherwise you will hear everything from within and without the hotel.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Vị trí thuận lợi gần cầu Rồng, cách sân bay 10 phút, gần nhiều quán cafe view đẹp. Có dịch vụ thuê xe máy tại KS. Nhân viên rất hỗ trợ việc cho mượn áo mưa.

reviews.title: It Was a Decent Stay
reviews.positives: Nice Staff and Clean and Fairly Quite not To much Horn blowing
reviews.negatives: It Was. A little Bit out of Beach Side Da Nang but Ok

reviews.title: Best value for money hotel
reviews.text: It was great to be close to downtown areas like the Han Market and the Pink Church, and the staff were friendly. Communication was sufficiently possible through a translation app, and they lent me a knife and plates for the fruits I bought. I stayed for three days, and there is no better value hotel for relaxation!

reviews.title: Great hotel and lovely staff
reviews.positives: Great room and good facilities so very good value for money. The lovely lady on reception was so nice and very accommodating. Would defo stay again.
reviews.negatives: The location is okay if you only stay a few nights but not too much around it for a uk tourist.

reviews.title: 1 night (arrival, departure) is fine.
reviews.text: It's good and reasonable for the price. It's better than the center hotel next door.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The receptionist was marvellous along with all the other staff. They went out of their way to make you feel at home. The location is ideal for shopping at the Han market also very close to good restaurants coffee shops and massage parlours etc. very close to the Dragon bridge banks & ATM machines. Beautiful area ❤️
reviews.negatives: Everything was perfect

reviews.title: Perfect location for a half-day stay!
reviews.text: I was surprised that the lights were off when I arrived, but I was impressed that the reception staff was waiting for us arriving at 2 AM. Although the elevator going up was closed off late at night, we used it during checkout. After checkout, we were able to leave our luggage, and communication in English was possible, and the staff was friendly. The room wasn't spacious, and the bathroom was inconvenient, but it was reasonably priced for a half-night stay. The bedding was also clean.

reviews.title: service and attention to guests.
reviews.positives: Wow! Where should I begin? This is the best place I've ever stayed. The service is impeccable, the cleanliness is incredible, and they take special care of their guests. It's the best location in the city. You can make your reservation without fear! A special mention goes to the receptionist (I don't remember her name), who was extremely attentive and helpful. Thank you for everything! I'll stay here every time I return! 🇧🇷🇧🇷
reviews.negatives: I don't see any negative points.

reviews.title: Value-for-money accommodation with a good location.
reviews.text: The lobby is on the second floor and there are stairs in front of you, but if you have a lot of luggage, you can use the elevator inside on the first floor. The room was clean, but overall it was narrow and a bit old. The front desk staff was friendly. If asked whether I would stay here again at this price, I would be willing to. There are no amenities to speak of. The location is good, right next to a traditional market. A popular Korean restaurant, Geumdangdae, is right in front of the accommodation. It is a cost-effective place to stay.

reviews.title: Great place to stay in Da Nang
reviews.positives: We arrived in the early hours of the morning and the lady checked us in straight away, even changing us to a different room as the aircon wasn’t working in the first room. Rented a bike from the hotel, and staff were very friendly and helpful.

reviews.title: A necessary and sufficient hotel
reviews.text: I think it’s an old building, but the plumbing has been renovated and is clean. The bed mattress is also good (probably new), and the linens are pure white and comfortable. It’s nice to have small towels in addition to bath towels. There are two rooms on each floor, and the room at the back also gets natural light through the window. You can borrow a hairdryer at the front desk. Some of the front desk staff did not speak English, but everyone was kind. Great value for the price.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Super friendly, great appartments
reviews.negatives: So clean and modern

reviews.title: Suitable accommodation for resting.
reviews.text: I made a reservation to pack my luggage and rest since I have to take an early morning flight. I booked it for a really affordable price, and they gladly accommodated my requests. The female staff member was really kind. 💛

reviews.title: A good place to rest before returning home.
reviews.text: This is a great place to relax before returning home on a night flight. The Da Nang Pink Cathedral is nearby, and there are plenty of good restaurants around. It exceeds my expectations.

reviews.title: Good accommodation for 0.5 nights.
reviews.text:
A great accommodation for a short rest due to late entry and exit. 
Reasonably priced around 10,000 won. 
It's conveniently located near a traditional market and restaurants. 
Easy to access with a key and nice to have air conditioning on.

reviews.title: Good good for 0.5 nights.
reviews.text: It was good to use the market, the staff were friendly, and overall I was satisfied! I would be willing to visit again and I found it satisfactory considering the price.

reviews.title: It's good because the route is short.
reviews.text: The market is close to the Han River, and there are many restaurants in the vicinity, making it easily accessible. It’s a great place to stay for a day when entering or leaving the country before moving to another area.

reviews.title: the best choice
reviews.text:
It's the best cost-effective hotel in Da Nang. 
1) Best location within a two-minute walk of Han Market
2) The extreme kindness of the staff, including Ms. Phuong
3) Old but cleanly well-maintained facilities and neat rooms
If you want the best hotel, go to a 5-star, and if you want location, kindness, and the best cost-effectiveness, I recommend this hotel.

reviews.title: Great value for money.
reviews.text: It's clean and right next to Han Market, located in the center, and it's cheap and good.

reviews.title: Very worth your money
reviews.text: The property exceeded our expectations with its prime location, impeccable cleanliness, and exceptional staff service. The facilities were top-notch, offering everything we needed for a comfortable stay. Overall, a fantastic experience and highly recommended!

reviews.title: 굿굿 혼자갔는데 괜찮음
reviews.text:
만오천원치고 가성비 지림
한국 펜션으로치면 10~15만원
이름은 호텔인데 모텔갬성임
그리고 직원들이 존나친절해서 부담스러웠음ㅋㅋㅋ
나도 더 격식차리고 굽신굽신하게됨
에어컨 빵빵함
온수x 냉수x 적당히 따듯할듯말듯한 미지근한물o
드라이기x
이불 얇음 그래서 잘때 에어컨 세게틀어놓으면 좀추움

reviews.title: Great hotel
reviews.text: Very nice small hotel -quiet but in the center, a few meters distance to the river, the Da Nang Han Market and many restaurants around. Wonderful staff. Highly recommended!

reviews.title: It's clean and nice.
reviews.text: The price-to-value ratio, location, and cleanliness were very good... It's worth the price..!!! The location is great, and considering the cleanliness and everything else at this price, I intend to stay here again next time.

reviews.title: Quiet & friendly hotel in the centre
reviews.text:
We just stayed a night. It was perfect for that purpose. Staff is very friendly & helpful. Room was nice & clean incl flat screen, good working A/C, hot shower and comfortable bed. Complementary water provided.
The hotel is located in a quiet street but very close to the river, bars & restaurants. We felt safe and looked after in this small & friendly hotel.
We would return anytime if we need a room in Da Nang.

reviews.title: Right next to the market.
reviews.text: There is an elevator and everything is satisfactory for the price. However, there was a list of prices for the lodging items, and when I mentioned that there was no hairdryer, they acknowledged it, but I ended up having to explain it in detail during checkout. I regretted not taking the hairdryer when they offered it. I checked out without any issues. It wasn't noisy, and I was very satisfied.

reviews.title: It's great for a 0.5-night stay, a 1-night stay is also definitely possible.
reviews.text: I booked for 0.5 nights and worried after reading reviews that it was dirty and had ants, but although the facilities are old, it was tidy and well-organized, the layout is nice, the room is spacious, and the location is excellent!! Nowadays, prices in Da Nang are high, so is there another hotel as clean and well-located as this? The desk staff is very kind. If I go again, I definitely want to stay here.

reviews.title: The deluxe king room offers great value for money.
reviews.text: I booked a Deluxe King Room for 2 nights at a price in the 70,000 won range. The location is right next to the main market, so it's obviously the best!! The cleanliness is top-notch!! The staff are friendly!! I had a great stay!! Highly recommended!!!

reviews.title: Good, basic, clean
reviews.text: Clean, reasonably quiet, basic hotel room. No view, but a window with light. Excellent location. Han market, Dragon Bridge, Starbucks all within a short walk. Would stay again.

reviews.title: It was good.
reviews.text: I stayed for about a week, and first of all, the location was fantastic, and the staff were extremely friendly. There are staff members who can communicate in English, and it's fine to use a translator with the older staff; they are cool and kind. Hot water worked well, and considering this is Japan, the bathroom isn't ridiculously small. You should keep in mind that it's a 20,000 yen accommodation per day. Since this hotel has fewer rooms than the one next door, it was actually quieter. I think I will use this place again when I go to Da Nang. They lent me a hairdryer, and when they saw me going out on a rainy day, they offered to lend me an umbrella first. Thank you to the staff who made my stay comfortable and friendly with their smiles. Stay healthy!

reviews.title: It's right next to the market and it's the best for 0.5 nights.
reviews.text: Kind staff and owner, and clean. Honestly, if you don't need a good hotel, you can fully enjoy your travel itinerary here.

reviews.title: It's excellent for the price.
reviews.text: I traveled alone and stayed for 3 days. The staff was kind and attentive. I saw in the reviews that a female employee was particularly mentioned for her kindness, and she really was very friendly and asked if I needed anything. Overall, it was great, and next time I go to Daegu, I plan to stay at Liberty again.

reviews.title: The location is really great.
reviews.text: The nearby market and the pink church are all accessible by foot to the Han River... If you are coming for a longer trip, it might be good to stay here for a day or two to get a feel for the atmosphere. The price is also very good. However, I would not recommend this for family trips. The facilities feel somewhat lacking...

reviews.title: Great place
reviews.text: Will definitely be back !

reviews.title: Clean & Beautiful
reviews.text: Near the Dragon Bridge, it is convenient for traveling and sightseeing.

reviews.title: It's very good.
reviews.text: I am a long-term traveler in Vietnam. I have experienced many accommodations, but this is the best one in terms of value for money. The facilities are clean, the staff is friendly, the location is great, the air conditioning is comfortable, and I really want to recommend this place.

reviews.title: It's the best.
reviews.text: You are so kind, and if I get to stay for 0.5 nights again next time, I will definitely come.

reviews.title: 0.5 night review
reviews.text: It's good for just sleeping at a cheap price as it's a 5-minute taxi ride from the airport after arriving at dawn. I recommend bringing your own shampoo and basic hygiene products, or buying disposable items at a nearby convenience store.

reviews.title: Really friendly! All the front staff and cleaning staff!
reviews.text: I had a hard time opening the door and couldn't open it alone, but everyone rushed over to help me ㅠㅠ The air conditioning was great and the location was awesome. I recommend it for a 0.5-night stay. If I land on a night flight again, I would go back.

reviews.title: Location is excellent!
reviews.text: I had a good night's rest at a great location for an affordable price. The staff were friendly, and it was truly a good location at a good price. The best!!

reviews.title: Last day of stay.
reviews.text: So-so.. There are 5-star facilities, so it was a bit frustrating but not bad. The location is good.

reviews.title: Accommodation very close to the market.
reviews.text: It was difficult to open the door, but you came and directly demonstrated it for me and responded kindly. If you go in on the left side of the entrance stairs, there is an elevator, so please take it up.

reviews.title: Location and good price.
reviews.text: Location is great, close to markets, churches, Korean restaurants, riverside, and barbershops. You can go anywhere right away, the staff is friendly, and it is clean.

reviews.title: Très bien
reviews.text:
L’hôtel est idéalement situé entre le marché Hàn et la cathédrale.
Les chambres Deluxe King Room sont spacieuses et bien meublées.
Les réceptionnistes se montrent souriantes, serviables et super sympa !
Le jour de mon départ, l’une d’entre elle m’a même transporté sur sa moto jusqu’au parking du célèbre musée Cham, point de rendez-vous des minibus qui se rendent à Hội An, et a ensuite patiemment attendu le départ de mon minibus pour s’éclipser !

reviews.title: Günstiges Hotel im City Center
reviews.text:
Die leiseste Klimaanlage, die ich je hatte. 

Einziges Manko. Im Bad ist Schimmel und es riecht muffig, wenn die Abluft nicht läuft. Was nicht wundert, weil die Dusche macht alles nass.

Ansonsten gerne wieder.

reviews.title: Verblijf da nang
reviews.text: Voor 1 nacht is dit een prima verblijf. Het was schoon genoeg en de airco werkte. Wel waren en verschillende insecten (mieren en vliegen) aanwezig. De locatie was wel echt top, dichtbij veel locale tentjes maar ook touristische plekken.

reviews.title: 별로
reviews.text: 수건에 캐리어바퀴자국있다고 100만동 주라고했어요. 베트남 10번더갔는데 이런숙소는 처음이네요
reviews.response:
고객님, 안녕하세요.
저희 호텔 서비스를 이용해 주시고 소중한 의견을 주셔서 진심으로 감사드립니다. 고객님의 의견은 저희 호텔 서비스 개선과 향상에 있어 큰 영광이자 소중한 자산입니다.

호텔에서의 만족스럽지 못한 경험에 대해 진심으로 사과드립니다. 직원들과 확인한 결과, 수건이 심하게 오염되어 세탁이 필요한 경우에는 세탁 요금을 고객님께 청구할 수 있으며, 이 사항은 객실에 비치된 안내문에 명시되어 있음을 안내드립니다.

고객님께서 저희에게 제공해 주신 100,000 베트남 동은 세탁 요금으로 확인하였음을 알려드립니다.
이해해 주시고 양해해 주신 것에 대해 감사드립니다.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
19일 예약을 할 때 체크인 날짜를 20일로 입력했는데 실수했습니다. 호텔 프런트에 가서 상황을 설명했지만, 자기 호텔이 아니라고 했습니다. 이메일을 보냈지만 답장이 없었습니다.
나중에 지나가던 지역 주민에게 호텔 사진을 보여줬더니 제가 가봤던 호텔이라고 확인해 주었습니다.
정말 어이가 없었습니다. 가격이 너무 비싸서 돈을 낭비했습니다. 프런트에 가서 "전혀 다르다"고 하니까 더 화가 났습니다. 19일에 이메일을 보냈는데 20일에 답장이 왔습니다.
이미 다른 호텔을 예약했는데도 말이죠 ~

reviews.title: 개미들이 우글우글
reviews.text: 직원 문잠그고 자고있움 위생상태 상관없으면 위치는 괜춘

reviews.title: ㅜㅜ그냥미케비치앞으로
reviews.text: 잡으세요

reviews.title: 위치말곤 최악이에요

일단 여관이라 생각 하고요 

1박에 15000원 넘어가면 다른데가세요

마지막날 12시 비행기라 8시간 쉰다는 느낌으로 가세요


에어컨 ㅅㅂ

reviews.title: 최악
reviews.text:
뜨거운물 안나오고 문 한번에 절대 안열림 문열려면 고생쫌 해야됨 
이불에 곰팡이 숙소 컨디션 최악

reviews.title: 이불벌레최고
reviews.text:
이불에 벌레가 한두마리가 아니여서
잠시도 쉬지 못하고 짐에 벌레가 들어갈까봐 도망나오듯 체크아웃 했습니다...

reviews.title: 인생 최악의 호텔 🏨🛏️😡
reviews.text: The worst hotel in my life. Even after traveling to many countries for decades, this is the first time I've seen a hotel like this. The windows can't be opened, and a flock of pigeons are building houses on the window shelves, facing the hotel across the street, making the room visible, narrow, smelly, and a paradise for bugs. The bathroom is rotten and doesn't drain, and after showering, there's a flood, and the TV remote is broken, so I can't even turn it on. I've never seen a hotel like this in my life.

reviews.title: 빈대가....
reviews.text:
망고를 먹다가 잠시 나갔다 왔더니 빈대?가 잔뜩 몰려있더라고요. 세면대와 샤워기도 흔들흔들 불안하더라고요. 침대 시트도청결하지 못했습니다.
위치만 좋아요

reviews.title: 자유여행
reviews.text:
아고다에서 위치만보고 비행기포함이라 무작정결제했는데 핑크성당바로앞 한시장20미터? 위치는 진짜좋고 직원들 친절은 합니다 
단점 방음최악ㆍ숙소입출입 열쇠를 사용해서열음ㆍ커피포토는 진짜최악 저는 휴대용커피포토가지고 가서 사용해서큰문제는 없었지만 눈으로 시커먼 물때가 ㅎㄷㄷ

가격은 싸여 키가 열쇠키라서 안에 쾌적하게 에어컨 켜놓고 다니기 좋습니다.
수영장도 있다고 표기 되어 있지만 없습니다

reviews.title: 그냥 저냥..
reviews.text: 가격대비는 괜찮은데 새벽에 도착해서 짐두고 배고파서 나가려는데 잠깐사이에 입구문잠구고 입구에서 이블깔고 자고있음ㅋㅋ 피곤한건 알겠는데 입구를 막는건 조금ㅋㅋㅋ 깨우기 미안해서 그냥 올라가서 잤음ㅋ 싼곳들보면 다 냄새난다 개미있다 그러는데 예민하지 않음 상관없음 ㅋ 비싼대가도 있음ㅋㅋ 안예민해도 개미는 물어서 싫다하시면 새건물 아님 나무바닥은 피하세요ㅋㅋ

그 외 화장실 곰팡이, 헤드쪽 먼지 청소 안함.
화장실이 침대옆이라 자면서 화장실 보면서 자야할수도 있음. 침대 엄청 삐걱거림. 나는 혼자와서 이런거 신경안쓰고 잠만 잘꺼다 하면 말리진 않겠음.

방은 좀 작은 편입니다. 캐리어 펼 공간이 애매합니다.
가장 큰 단점은 좁은 샤워 공간입니다. 조심해서 샤워해야 합니다.

reviews.title: 청소비 따로받는데 처음봄
reviews.text: 시트 청소비 5만동 따로 받던뎅
reviews.response:
고객님, 저희 호텔을 방문해 주셔서 진심으로 감사드립니다.
여행 중 저희가 고객님을 모실 수 있어 매우 영광이었습니다.
고객님의 소중한 의견은 호텔이 더 나은 서비스를 제공할 수 있도록 큰 도움이 됩니다.

추가 요금과 관련하여 안내 말씀드립니다.
수건이나 침구류에 심하게 오염된 경우, 강력한 세탁 처리가 필요하여 세탁비를 별도로 청구드리고 있습니다.
이 점 너그럽게 양해해 주시기를 부탁드립니다.

다시 한 번 감사드리며, 고객님의 건강과 행복을 기원합니다. 감사합니다.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Khách sạn gần khu sầm uất của ĐN, tiện đi lại. Do mới đăng ký Agoda nên thiếu chuyên nghiệp trong quá trình xác nhận booking, cụ thể là yêu cầu chuyển tiền cọc 50% trong khi Agoda ko yêu cầu. Khóa phòng bằng chìa khóa kiểu cũ, khá bất tiện khi mở, phòng khóa bị hư, phải nhờ nhân viên mở giúp. Yêu cầu đổi phòng nhưng ko được đáp ứng ngay.

reviews.title: Du lịch Đà Nẵng
reviews.text: Khách sạn ở khu trung tâm gần chợ Hàn, cầu sông Hàn, đông vui, nhộn nhịp nhưng ko có chỗ để ô tô đâu nhé. Phòng trung tâm nên hơi nhỏ.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: This place is very near the river, and exellent vallue for money.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: 101% satisfying !

reviews.title: Sååå bra
reviews.text: Jättesöt och snäll personal som verkligen gjorde allt för att vi skulle trivas! Stort och fräscht rum!
